title: agropyron dasystachyum
intro: Agropyron dasystachyum, also known as Big Bluegrass or Blue Grama, is a type of perennial grass native to the prairies of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agropyron dasystachyum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Agropyron dasystachyum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
